nasb.text: then it shall be if the wicked man deserves to be beaten, the judge shall then make him lie down and be beaten in his presence with the number of stripes according to his guilt.

esv.text: then if the guilty man deserves to be beaten, the judge shall cause him to lie down and be beaten in his presence with a number of stripes in proportion to his offense.

cnv.text: 如果有罪的人應受責打，審判官就要叫他伏下，當面按著他的罪，照著數目責打他。

ccb.text: 如果有罪的一方被判受鞭打，审判官要命令他当场伏在地上，按罪行轻重受刑。
